rewards.title: Forest Theme
rewards.description: Unlock a calming green styling for your workspace.

rewards.title: Deep Space Soundscape
rewards.description: Calming cosmic synth sounds for absolute concentration.

rewards.title: Double Streak Card
rewards.description: Protects your streak for one day if you miss a session.

rewards.title: Cyberpunk Theme
rewards.description: Neon overlays and futuristic dashboard alerts.

messages.text: Stretching for 5 mins, then back to math!

aiConfig.systemPrompt: You are FocusFlow AI Tutor. Provide structured explanations and advice. Maintain a supportive educational tone. Encourage the student to avoid distraction and use Pomodoro blocks.

tickets.subject: Distraction shield not blocking Chrome extensions
tickets.message: I notice my extension is still letting youtube pages load even when focus lock is active.

replies.text: Hello! Please make sure you have granted file access permissions to the Study Shield extension.
